📰 Daily Farm Brief – 28 February 2026

> Your 3-minute roundup of today's important farming updates. ---

🌦 Today's Weather Risks

- Scotland (YELLOW): Heavy rain expected across Highlands tomorrow. *Field work suspended, flooding risk low-lying areas* - Midlands (YELLOW): Frost risk overnight, temps down to -1°C. *Protect tender crops, check livestock housing* - South West: 11°C, no alerts - East Anglia: 6°C, no alerts ---

📈 Market Prices

- Feed Wheat: £165.0/t ↑ (£+2.5) - Feed Barley: £155.0/t ↓ (£+1.0) - Rapeseed: £420.0/t ↑ (£+5.0) - Milk: 0.38p/L ---

💰 Grant Updates

- Sustainable Farming Incentive (£20-£450/ha): Payment schedule changes announced for Countryside Stewardship - Farming Investment Fund (£25,000-£500,000): New round opens for equipment and technology | Deadline: 31 Mar 2026 - Rural Payments Agency (N/A): New livestock unit calculation tool released --- *Updated automatically at 06:00 UTC.
